visual_analysis.description: A clear plastic bottle with a blue cap, located in the middle-back of the shelf.
A red soda can positioned directly in front of the clear water bottle.
A brown plastic bottle with a teal cap, located to the left of the water bottle.
A green soda can located to the right of the red soda can.
A brown cardboard box behind the bottles and cans.

action_plan.explanation: The red soda can is in front of and blocking the robot's access to the clear water bottle.
The clear water bottle is now accessible and fulfills the user's request for mineral water.
